skills.name: git-commit-convention
intents: generate a commit message from git diff
split mixed changes into separate commits
根据仓库规范生成提交信息
将改动拆分为多个提交
生成约定式提交格式的信息
useCases: User wants to commit staged changes and needs a message that follows the repo's CONTRIBUTING.md rules.
User has a diff mixing feature work and formatting fixes and needs guidance on splitting commits.
User asks Codex to commit all changes and wants the commit message to match the project's conventional commit standard.
用户要求根据仓库的AGENTS.md规范为暂存区改动生成提交信息。
用户需要将包含功能开发和文档更新的混合改动拆分为两个独立的提交。

skills.name: oss-upload-folder
intents: upload a local folder to Alibaba Cloud OSS
sync a directory to OSS bucket
useCases: Upload a static website's dist/ folder to an OSS bucket for hosting.
Sync a local backup directory to OSS for offsite storage.
Deploy frontend build output to multiple OSS buckets for multi-region distribution.
Preview which files will be uploaded to OSS before performing the actual upload.
Mirror a local media library to OSS using the CLI tool.
将静态网站的dist文件夹上传到OSS存储桶用于托管。

skills.name: aws-s3-upload-folder
intents: 将本地文件夹上传到 S3
useCases: Publish a static website by syncing the build output folder to an S3 bucket.
Upload a directory of assets to multiple S3 buckets for redundancy.
通过同步构建输出文件夹到 S3 存储桶来发布静态网站。
将资产目录上传到多个 S3 存储桶以实现冗余。

skills.name: aws-cloudfront-invalidate
intents: clear CloudFront cache for specific paths
create CloudFront invalidation with AWS CLI
useCases: After deploying a static site to S3, invalidate /index.html and /assets/* on CloudFront to serve the latest content.
Before invalidating, verify that the CloudFront distribution is associated with the domain example.com using the --alias flag.
Preview an invalidation for /images/* on distribution E1234567890ABC using --dry-run to avoid accidental cache clearing.
Invalidate multiple paths like /about.html and /contact.html on a CloudFront distribution after a content update.
Use the skill to automate CDN cache refresh in a CI/CD pipeline after uploading new assets to S3.

skills.name: ai-cli-context-governance
intents: 优化 AI CLI 长上下文性能
构建证据驱动的生成流程
提升 prompt caching 效率
useCases: 当 AI CLI 对话轮次增加后响应变慢，需要压缩上下文并引入检索机制
模型在长上下文中引用过时信息或编造不存在的文件，需要实施证据约束
设计新的 AI CLI 工具时，规划 hot/warm/cold 三层上下文架构
为现有 CLI 添加 /compact 命令以将对话压缩为结构化状态
排查 prompt 中重复发送完整历史导致 token 超限的问题
需要固定关键约束或文件到每轮上下文，防止模型偏离目标

skills.name: bucket-upload-policy
intents: 判断大文件是否应上传到对象存储
生成制品清单而非提交二进制文件
保持仓库轻量避免提交大文件
管理技能相关的外部资产引用
useCases: 当技能包含PDF、图片或视频等非代码资产时，使用此策略决定上传到OSS并生成manifest
需要将大型测试文件或二进制样例存储到S3，并在仓库中仅保留链接和校验信息
在公共技能仓库中，通过OSS公开访问技能相关截图和文档，避免仓库膨胀

skills.name: public-skills-catalog
useCases: 用户询问“这个仓库有哪些技能”时，读取并渲染技能目录
需要按分类（如代码生成、文档处理）筛选技能
安装某个技能前，检查是否有推荐的关联技能
新增或更新技能后，自动更新目录、分类和关联JSON文件
